h2: How we act today protects how we live tomorrow. Tomorrow should be cleaner, safer, and more responsible than yesterday. Because sustainability does not have an endpoint, we are constantly improving our processes to better deliver high-quality products while minimizing environmental impact.
h3: Heat & Glo has been revolutionizing the hearth industry for nearly 50 years, so innovating sustainable solutions just feels right to us. Our commitment to responsible eco-stewardship, by creating and manufacturing hearth products that are responsible and respectful of the environment, is part of our insatiable pursuit of better.
Our goal is to reduce energy intensity
Our goal is zero waste to landfill by 2030

paragraphs: How we act today protects how we live tomorrow. Tomorrow should be cleaner, safer, and more responsible than yesterday. Because sustainability does not have an endpoint, we are constantly improving our processes to better deliver high-quality products while minimizing environmental impact.

Hearth & Home Technologies® (HHT), Heat & Glo’s parent company, was proud to participate in CBS News’ Innovation and Disruption Leaders series, where we talked about our dedication to innovation, sustainability and corporate social responsibility in the hearth industry. We continue to actively innovate to adapt to a changing world and a desire for modernized, sustainably-made fire features. With a dedicated focus on integrating sustainable initiatives into every aspect of our business—from product conception to consumer use—HHT is evolving hearth products, and hearth manufacturing, for a new age. Watch the short video, featuring interviews with key HHT leaders, here.

Heat & Glo has been revolutionizing the hearth industry for nearly 50 years, so innovating sustainable solutions just feels right to us. Our commitment to responsible eco-stewardship, by creating and manufacturing hearth products that are responsible and respectful of the environment, is part of our insatiable pursuit of better.

Our goal is to reduce energy intensity by 50% by 2035. Since 2018, we have implemented projects which are estimated to save 5.45 million kwh or the power of 506 average American homes.Here's how we did it:

Our goal is zero waste to landfill* by 2030 in all our plants. By integrating new reclamation methods, including wood recycling and refractory diversion in all our facilities, we are on track to reach that goal.In addition, we eliminated the use of expanded polystyrene (EPS) foam in fireplace product packaging.*Defined as 95% diversion from landfill

In 2023, we were recognized by the U.S. Department of Energy for reducing combined Scope 1 & 2 emissions. We believe these are fundamental steps to creating a more sustainable and environmentally friendly future.
One hundred percent of our key suppliers have signed HNI Corporation’s Code of Conduct, ensuring they share our commitment to meet high-standard sustainable and ethical business practices, including:
The new SupremeX gas insert delivers a superior flame experience with 17% lower BTUs than its predecessor, conserving energy and saving money.
As well, the LED bulbs in SupremeX’s ember bed far outlast halogen bulbs, remaining operable for years and minimizing associated waste.

In 2023, we implemented a design for environment process to integrate environmental considerations into our new product development procedure. Through this, our engineers will assess, and begin to mitigate, environmental impacts at the conception of a new product.

98% of our gas fireplaces are manufactured with intermittent pilot ignition (IPI). The IPI feature means you do not need a traditional standing (always on) pilot in your gas fireplace. The pilot lights when you turn on your fireplace, and goes out when you turn your unit off, saving money and fuel and reducing greenhouse gas emissions as compared to a standing pilot ignition system.

Our heat management solutions give you flexibility to heat your home the way it works for you. If you find yourself in a room often, consider turning down your furnace while you enjoy the warmth of your fireplace. Want to redirect the heat to another room? You can do so!
All of our products meet or exceed industry regulations. With efficiencies as high as 99.9%, many of our products also mitigate waste and maximize energy, no matter which fuel option you choose.

Electric fireplaces offer the charm of a fireplace with the convenience of electric, making them an optimal choice for homeowners. They have nearly 100% efficient heat generation, low emissions, and offer the ability to operate with or without heat, allowing homeowners to provide ambiance to their spaces any time of the year.

Be inspired by the first custom home built completely around sustainable design and living. Learn how top brands like Heat & Glo outfitted the Net Zero ICONIC Home with earth-friendly and renewable products. Featured are sustainably sourced stone, appliances from recycled materials, “smart home” advances and both gas and electric fireplaces that change the game with efficiency and resource conservation.
Connect with a Heat & Glo dealer near you to see the products firsthand or ask about specific pricing and details.
